title: tagetes lucida
intro: Tagetes lucida, also known as Mexican marigold, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to possess medicinal value in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tagetes lucida include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to support digestive health and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Tagetes lucida include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
